summary: Complete tabular inventory of every file produced by Antigravity in the last 48 hours (2026-04-08 to 2026-04-10), organised by project/conversation. Each row includes the file name, format, size, project, and a clickable file:// link. Covers both Workspace files (canonical deliverables in VELYON - LEGAL COMMAND CENTER) and Brain files (plans, reports, images in the antigravity brain).
